m.property; if (attribute) { if (metaByAttribute[attribute]) { continue; } else { metaByAttribute[attribute] = true; } } resultMeta.push({ tag: "meta", attrs: { ...m, nonce } }); } } } if (title) { resultMeta.push(title); } if (nonce) { resultMeta.push({ tag: "meta", attrs: { property: "csp-nonce", content: nonce } }); } resultMeta.reverse(); return resultMeta; }, [routeMeta, nonce]); const links = useRouterState.useRouterState({ select: (state) => { const constructed = state.matches.map((match) => match.links).filter(Boolean).flat(1).map((link) => ({ tag: "link", attrs: { ...link, nonce } })); const manifest = router.ssr?.manifest; const assets = state.matches.map((match) => manifest?.routes[match.routeId]?.assets ??
